input.prompt: A slow cinematic dolly across a quiet sunlit library, dust motes drifting in golden light, documentary tone

browser_proof: pure requests HTTP only; no headless/remote-debugging/puppeteer/playwright process at any point; Chrome PID count unchanged (34->34); the only new PIDs were --type=renderer children of the pre-existing interactive Chrome root (PID 82759, started 2 days before the run), not a new automation browser
operator_key_note: Rendered with the operator's KIE_API_KEY for operator-side adapter verification ONLY; production uses client-funded keys. The key value is never recorded here.
reproduce: Set KIE_API_KEY in the OpenMontage clone .env, then have OpenMontage invoke the kie_video tool (gemini-omni-video, duration as STRING, aspect_ratio always set) and confirm result.data contains kie_task_id + kie_result_url; ffprobe the downloaded MP4 for duration>0 + a video stream.
